walnut-pie-without-syrup-argiro.name: Walnut Pie Without Syrup
instructions: Wash the orange first.
Cut it to four.
Remove the pits and white membranes.
We mash it in the blender.
Shake the flour with baking and spices.
In the hand mixer, beat the butter and sugar to fluffy.
Add the yolks one by one to drink the mixture.
Add the pulped orange, walnut and flour.
Mix gently.
Beat the whites with salt, in a bowl with wire, until soft peaks are formed.
Add the meringue to the mixture, gently fold.
Pour the mixture into a small square baking pan of 22 or 24 million.
Bake in a well preheated ocean at 170°C on the resistors, on the bottom grill, for about 45 minutes, until golden, puffy and clean.
Alternatively, baking at 160°C in the air, in the middle grill, for about 40 minutes.
If it comes out clean and unleavened, it's ready.
Let it cool completely.
Ash and serve with vanilla ice cream.

watermelon-and-jicama-salad-with-jalapen.name: Watermelon And Jicama Salad With Jalapeño And Lime
instructions: Gently toss watermelon, jicama, jalapeño, scallion, cilantro, and lime juice in a large bowl; season generously with salt.

watermelon-with-lime-dressing-and-peanut.name: Watermelon With Lime Dressing And Peanuts
instructions: Slice off both ends of the watermelon, then stand it upright on a flat side. Cut away rind in long curving strokes.

Halve melon crosswise. Working with one half at a time with the cut side facing up, slice off irregular bite-size pieces. Continue making your way around the melon, turning it as you work (standing it on the round side makes it easier to maneuver).

Stir lime juice, fish sauce, sugar, and 1 Tbsp. water in a large bowl until sugar is dissolved. Lightly crush 2 basil sprigs by scrunching up in your hand and add to dressing along with watermelon; toss gently until coated.
Transfer watermelon salad to a platter, leaving basil sprigs behind. Top with peanuts and basil leaves, drizzle with oil, and season with salt.

weekday-broccoli-soup.name: Weekday Broccoli Soup
instructions: In a pan on medium heat, sauté onion in oil until translucent. Add garlic, salt, and pepper and saute.
Add 1 cup of water, add broccoli pieces, and if needed, add more water to ensure broccoli is covered.
Cook for 8 minutes or until broccoli starts to soften.
Blend the mixture well using an immersion blender, add butter, and stir to melt.
Season and garnish to taste. Serve warm alongside toasted sourdough bread.
Enjoy!

whiskey-slush.name: Whiskey Slush
instructions: Combine water, tea, whiskey, lemonade concentrate, sugar, and orange juice concentrate in a large plastic container; stir well. Freeze for 24 hours.
Scoop slush into a tall glass, filling 3/4 full. Add ginger ale to fill glass; stir. Garnish with lemon wedges.

white-asparagus-cream-pequerecetas.name: White Asparagus Cream

ingredients.item: 500 g of fresh white asparagus (about 2 big sleeves)
750 ml de caldo de verduras suave (o agua con sal)
2 cucharadas de aceite de oliva virgen extra
Un chorrito extra de aceite de oliva para servir

instructions: We moan well with a peller from the yolk to the base and cut about 2-3 cm from the bottom end, which is usually hard. We booked some whole tipples to decorate at the end and cut the rest into medium pieces.
We washed and cut the leek into thin slices, and we peeled the potato, shredded it into small cubes.
In a large casserole, we heated up the two tablespoons of olive oil and revamed the leek about 5 minutes with medium heat, till it's tender.
We add the scrawny asparagus (less the reserved points) and the potato, and we sauté all with a few minutes.
We have a hot vegetable broth and cook about 20- 25 minutes at medium heat, till the asparagus are tender.
Meanwhile, we have to cook the asparagus points we have booked with salt water for 5 minutes. We put them out and let them slip.
We cut the cream with a beaker or an American glass till as thin as possible. If we prefer it very soft, we pass it through a paddle or Chinese.
Probamos de sal y ajustamos si es necesario.

white-bean-chicken-chili.name: White Bean Chicken Chili

ingredients.item: Salt and black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot, and cook onion and garlic until soft.
Stir in broth, then add in tomatillos, tomatoes, and chiles. Stir together and season with oregano, coriander, and cumin. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 10 minutes.
Add chicken, beans, and corn; simmer 5 minutes. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot and enjoy!

white-chocolate-flan.name: White Chocolate Flan
instructions: Combine white and brown sugar and water in a saucepan over medium-high heat. Stir occasionally to dissolve the sugar completely, but stop stirring once the mixture comes to a boil to prevent the sugar from crystallizing.

Swirl the pan gently to redistribute the caramel as the sugar begins to darken. Cook to about 154°C (160 degrees C), or until the sugar turns light golden brown. Remove from heat immediately, as sugar will continue to darken.
Pour the caramel in an 8-inch baking dish, coating the bottom and sides of the dish. Let caramel harden, about 5 minutes.
Preheat an oven to 163°C (165 degrees C).

Melt the white chocolate in a microwave-safe glass or ceramic bowl in 30-second intervals, stirring after each melting, for 1 to 3 minutes (depending on your microwave). Do not overheat or chocolate will scorch.
Cream together the cream cheese, mascarpone cheese, evaporated milk, sweetened condensed milk, eggs, and melted white chocolate in a bowl until smooth.
Pour the cream cheese mixture over the hardened caramel.
Place baking dish in a large roasting pan. Fill the roasting pan with about 1-inch water.
Bake in the preheated oven until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean, about 1 hour.

Refrigerate until completely chilled, 5 to 6 hours. To serve, run a paring knife along the edges of the baking dish to loosen the flan. Cover the baking dish with a plate, and invert it to tip the flan out of the pan and onto the plate.

white-chocolate-orange-cookies-lezzet.name: White Chocolate Orange Cookies

ingredients.item: 125 gr butter ( softened in the heat of the room)

instructions: 1. thoroughly combine with the help of butter and sugar mixer.
2. Continue to add 1 eggs on it and slate.
3. Add orange juice, grated orange peel, flour, baking powder and vanilla.
4. Finally add and mix white drop chocolate.
5. Oiled paper to tray cool.
6. Share the cookie dough with the help of the spoon intermittent to the tray.
7. Bake about 10-12 minutes in the oven, which is pre-heated to 160 degrees.
8. Serve cool.
9. You can find the classic orange cookie recipe here with step by step.

whole-grain-pasta-with-grilled-chicken-a.name: Whole Grain Pasta With Grilled Chicken And Butternut Squash

ingredients.item: Sea salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).
Combine squash, 2 tablespoons olive oil, rosemary, sage, thyme, oregano, basil, sea salt, and pepper in a large bowl; toss until squash is coated with herbs. Transfer to a sheet pan.
Place in the preheated oven and cook until squash pieces turn golden brown on the bottom, 15 to 20 minutes. Remove from oven, flip with spatula, and cook until tender, 15 to 20 more minutes.
While squash is cooking, preheat an outdoor grill for medium-high heat and lightly oil the grate.
Brush chicken with remaining 1 tablespoon olive oil and season with sea salt and pepper.

Cook chicken on the preheated grill until no longer pink in the center and the juices run clear, 3 to 4 minutes per side. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 74°C (74 degrees C). Remove to a plate and cut into thin slices.

While chicken is cooking, bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Add penne and cook, stirring occasionally, until tender yet firm to the bite, about 11 minutes. Drain pasta and transfer to a large bowl. Top with roasted butternut squash and all oil and herbs from the sheet pan. Add chicken slices and sprinkle with Parmigiano-Reggiano cheese. Drizzle with remaining 2 tablespoons olive oil if pasta seems dry.

winter-greens-gratin.name: Winter Greens Gratin

ingredients.item: Diamond crystal or  0.75 tsp. morton kosher salt
Or 3 large bunches of tuscan kale and/or swiss chard

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. First, prep the cream sauce: Peel and quarter 1 medium onion. Smash 4 garlic cloves and unpeel. Place onion and garlic in a medium saucepan. Pour in 2 cups heavy cream and stir in 1 rosemary sprig, 1½ tsp. Diamond Crystal or ¾ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and ½ tsp. freshly ground black pepper. Bring to a simmer over low heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until onion and garlic are very soft, 15–20 minutes.

While cream cooks, remove ribs from 4 medium bunches of Tuscan kale. Tear leaves into big pieces and wash. It’s okay if some water still clings to the leaves—this will help them wilt later. If you don’t have a bowl big enough to hold all of your greens, pile them on a baking sheet instead.
When cream is ready, pluck out rosemary sprig and discard. Finely grate zest of ½ lemon into cream and stir in ¼ tsp. crushed red pepper flakes. Transfer to a blender and blend until smooth.

Heat a large (as large as possible—12" is the goal) ovenproof skillet over medium. Add about one-quarter of greens, cover skillet (use a baking sheet if you don’t have a lid), and cook until wilted, 3–4 minutes. Scoot wilted greens to one side of pan. Add another quarter of greens, cover pan, and cook to wilt, 3–4 minutes. Remove from heat and place skillet on a rimmed baking sheet.

Prep the toppings: Cut 6 oz. high-quality sharp cheddar cheese into ¼"-thick slices (you’ll have about 1½ cups). Place ½ cup panko to a small bowl and finely grate in zest of ½ lemon and remaining 1 garlic clove. Add 1 tsp. extra-virgin olive oil, season with salt and pepper, and stir to combine.

Pile remaining greens on top of wilted kale, pressing down to compact as needed. This will look BANANAS, but the greens will shrink dramatically in the oven. Carefully pour cream mixture over. It’s okay if it drips a little—that’s why it’s on a baking sheet. Break cheese slices into large crumbles and evenly distribute over top. Sprinkle panko mixture over.
Bake gratin until cheese is browned and bubbling and panko is toasted, 50–55 minutes.
Let cool 5 minutes before serving. Try not to eat the whole thing yourself!

winter-menemen-lezzet.name: Winter Menemen
instructions: 1. Wash and rein the tomatoes in g&uuml.
2. If you wish, you can see the cube cube.
3. Fine slice after washing and drying green peppers.
4. Add liquid oils and peppers to a large pot.
5. Roast the peppers in this oil until d&ouml.
6. Add grated or chopped tomatoes to your car.
7. Aka&ccedil with the help of wooden spoon; stir once and close the cover of the pot and leave it to pee.
8. When tomatoes begin to boil & stir again by adding salt to the car.
9. Then the cover of the pot is hungry in order to away, the butter juice until, cook about 2 hours.
10. Fill the water into the jars where it is not hot.
11. 11. 11. 11. Close the cover of the jar and reverse jars.
12. When the jars cool, you can keep the g&uuml in a cool place.
12. August You can prepare the winter menu, at any time & in the same time.
14.  Afiyet olsun.
